purpose: MCPL lookup key can carry one shard identity.
Receivers can decode shard identity from keys.
Lookup request message type is source-declared.
Lookup value reply packet is source-declared.
Lookup metadata reply packet is source-declared.
Lookup send path accepts explicit shard id.
Lookup readback path accepts explicit shard id.
Pending lookup entries store shard identity.
Runtime images can be compiled with a static shard id.
